docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,644.54 FILED BY CHUNG, BAN AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, YIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, BAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, YIM $1,982.59 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,042.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER ON DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT -GRANTED.
